text: In this environment, suffused with cool blue lights and surrounded by research and development motifs, I feel curious and contemplative. The presence of glass, digital screens, and conversations behind transparent walls heightens my sense of observation and detachment, as though I stand at the threshold between participation and analysis. The words about confusion and blurred perception resonate: I am reminded of the fragility of certainty and the ease with which clarity can slip away. It is a strange comfort, to be reminded that confusion is but a natural state on the path to understanding.
